questions.question: Explain the main differences between FCFS, SJF, and Prioritized Scheduling algorithms in the context of Multiple-Processor Scheduling. (10 marks)

A system has 4 processors and 10 processes. The processes have the following arrival times and burst times: P1 (0, 5), P2 (1, 3), P3 (2, 2), P4 (3, 4), P5 (4, 1), P6 (5, 6), P7 (6, 1), P8 (7, 3), P9 (8, 2), P10 (9, 4). (10 marks)
Explain the concept of Load Balancing in Multiple-Processor Scheduling. (10 marks)
